summary: Completed testing of TrustFundy → Savyn rebranding and admin email env var configuration. All 11 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend branding checks passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Savyn rebranding complete. All TrustFundy references replaced with Savyn. ADMIN_EMAILS env var working correctly.

✅ Marketplace endpoint /api/tontines/marketplace works (public, no auth required)
✅ Admin stats endpoint accessible for admin@savyn.com
✅ Admin users endpoint accessible for admin@savyn.com

rca_of_issue: Initial browser title test showed 'TrustFundy' instead of 'Savyn' due to frontend cache. Frontend restart resolved the issue - the source code was already correct (index.html line 24).
